top_signals.title: Trump tells CNBC: 'I don't care' if Iran negotiations are over
top_signals.summary: President Trump spoke with CNBC's Eamon Javers about the latest with the Iran war in an interview Monday.

top_signals.title: London Mayor Blames MAGA, Russia for Posts Attacking UK Capital
top_signals.summary:
Francine Lacqua speaks with Mayor of London, Sadiq Khan on SXSW London main stage as the annual business, technology, and creativity gathering kicks off in Shoreditch, London. 
He breaks down the UK's political environment, London's attractiveness for foreign investment and a recent wave of social media posts talking down the UK capital. (Source: Bloomberg)
